\tzpentry{ID4233}{Chern Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4233 introduces Chern Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \vec{B}_{\text{constraint}} = \lambda(\vec{r},t) \nabla \times \left[\vec{A}_{\text{gauge}} + \frac{\theta}{2\pi}\vec{K}_{\text{Chern-Simons}}\right] \end{equation}
